esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-tomcat.otel-*
| WHERE Catalina_Manager_rejectedSessions IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    max_rejected = MAX(Catalina_Manager_rejectedSessions),
    min_rejected = MIN(Catalina_Manager_rejectedSessions)
  BY host.name, attributes.context, attributes.host
| EVAL new_rejections = max_rejected - min_rejected
// Any session rejection means maxActiveSessions has been reached
// This directly impacts users who cannot establish new sessions
| WHERE new_rejections > 0
| SORT new_rejections DESC
